review_text: We got there with our caravan. Its a fantastic place to stay

The Park:
Tired, rather run down, and in desperate need of maintenance - not even the grass was mowed!   We were initially skeptical about staying however the welcome and assistance we received from the resident electrician Tony was fantastic,  just as well he was there because the receptionist doesn't speak a word of English, and whoever the lady is who cleans the ladies bathroom/showers should be paid a bonus - they are original 1960's tile and stone and they are absolutely spotless.

We had our own caravan and only stayed two nights but learnt the plans for the property and they sound great, but currently there is only one modern style cabin as featured on the website which gives the impression the park is modern and well kept, when in reality it is surrounded by a rather shabby hodge-podge of permanent fishing enthusiasts private caravans, and older style cabins which all appear to be equally in need of upgrading and maintaining.

The Location:
Walking distance to the tiny town of Adaminaby and the local pub.  The petrol station opposite didn't open once whilst we were there, so don't rely on getting fuel here.

Always enjoy staying at the Alpine Tourist Park. Convenient location to the high country as well as Lake Eucumbene for all our favourite boating and fishing activities. It's a regular post Christmas get away and a great way to kick off the year with some quiet R and R. Thanks to the team for making us feel most welcome on each and every visit...

A beautiful, peaceful park with clean and well-kept accommodation. It was lovely to see the new cabins being built — they look modern, stylish and very thoughtfully designed.

The kids had a great time exploring the park, riding around and visiting the chickens. The drive to Yarrangobilly Caves was stunning, with spotting wild brumbies along the way a real highlight. The caves themselves were incredible.

The owners and staff were friendly and extremely helpful. A great base for exploring the area and surrounding attractions.

During Our stay at the the alpine tourist park in Adaminaby, We were very pleased with the service from the team, rooms and ammenities. Not to mention the park is in the vicinity to many attractions in the area such as the lakes and ski fields.

The rooms were exceptionally clean and had all of the cooking appliances and bits & bobs needed to cook meals if staying for longer periods. The room had both air conditioning and heaters to cater for all seasons. I didn't find myself needing anything else during my stay that wasn't in the room.

Would highly recommend staying at the alpine tourist park if you're ever in the region.

We had a relaxing weekend at the Alpine Tourist Park. We stayed in Cabin 1 that has high standard with bathroom including both wc and shower. Tha cabin has a nice retro feeling but also comfort as ac and heater.
Outdoors in the park there is a wounderful outdoor kitchen including barbecue, stove, oven running water and fridge. Two tables under roof gives planty of space for dinners togheter.
The small village where the park is located breathes of hiatorical memories such as the church and bankoffice that were moved when the nearby lake expanded. In a short walk you can reach both the church and the bankoffice and a outdor swimling area.
Other activites that is wort exploring is the nearby national park with a termal pool. There is also a cave in the same spot. The lake is nice for fishing and has a good ramp for easily putting a boat into the water.
The helpfull staff is also wounderfull so a warm recomendation to explore the site.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at The Alpine Tourist Park and found it to be a very comfortable and welcoming place to relax. We stayed in Cabin 1, which had a lovely, classic cabin feel and was spacious, cosy, and well maintained.

The cabin had everything we needed for an easy and enjoyable stay, with a comfortable layout, and a pleasant communal outdoor area and private kitchen for cooking and relaxing. It was a peaceful setting and a perfect place to unwind.

The surrounding area offers plenty to do. We visited a national park about 40 minutes away, with beautiful walking tracks, impressive caves, and a natural swimming pool, a real highlight of the trip. We also enjoyed spending time fishing by the lake nearby.

Overall, it was a very relaxing stay in a beautiful location, and we would happily recommend The Alpine Park to friends and family.

We had such a wonderful stay at The Alpine Tourist Park, staying in Cabin 14, and it exceeded all expectations. The cabin is newly renovated and absolutely great, modern, completely new, and beautifully styled with a fresh, beachy feel.

It was spacious and thoughtfully laid out, making it perfect for both a couple or a family stay. The amenities were outstanding, from the large, luxurious shower to the relaxing bedroom, well equipped kitchen and fantastic communal BBQ area. Everything felt high quality, comfortable, and designed for a truly relaxing stay.

We also loved the location. There’s a national park just 40 minutes away with spectacular walks, magnificent caves, and a beautiful natural pool, well worth the visit. We spent time fishing by the lake nearby as well, and it’s a perfect getaway if you have a boat to bring along, especially for anyone who loves fishing.

We felt completely at home and wouldn’t hesitate to recommend The Alpine Tourist Park to anyone looking for a comfortable, and relaxing escape. We’d absolutely stay again.

Great get away location.
Service is impeccable.
Thank you Andrea, for your amazing hospitality.
We will return 😊
Quiet caravan park. Great service. Nice friendly staff

Stayed here recently for value with some family, but unfortunately the cabins and service leave more to be desired. Be mindful the photos online don’t do the state of the accomodation justice.

The bar isn’t very high for budget accomodation like this, but unfortunately it still remains below it.
Such a memorable stay , good times and a short trip to the snowfields and magical fresh snow valleys. Great food down the local pub. We loved our retro cabin, very cinematic

A truly magical place! With the beauty of Kosciuszko National Park and stunning farmland right on your doorstep, the surroundings are perfect for a scenic drive, a hike, or a snow adventure. |The Alpine Tourist Park has wonderfully friendly and accommodating staff, cosy cabins, and a welcoming country-holiday atmosphere – they’re even adding a hen house, which our kids loved hearing about. |Just a short stroll down the road you’ll find a pub with great food, and there’s also a convenient snow gear hire shop nearby. Our stay was a highlight of our family holiday, and we’d happily return.
Fantastic staff who are always willing to help out. Would definitely recommend

A hidden gem in the Snowy Mountains! Alpine Tourist Park is peaceful, clean, and very well-maintained. The cabins are cozy and comfortable, and the facilities are spotless. Perfect location for exploring the area or just relaxing in nature. The staff are super friendly and helpful – we felt really welcome from the moment we arrived. Highly recommend for anyone visiting the region!

We had a lovely time at the Tourist Park. The majority of the units are on the older side but are well provisioned, clean and warm. The staff were exceptional, friendly and very helpful.
Adaminaby is a lovely spot to stay - just over half an hour to Selwyn Ski Resort or Yarangobilly Caves. We had a fantastic time as group of three families.
Lovely cabin and nice and close to Selwyn with a beautiful drive through Kosciuszko National Park to get there. Everyone was lovely and made us feel very welcome :)

We had a wonderful time at Alpine Tourist Park! Simply amazing hosts, beautiful, comfy and cozy cabins a stunning 30-45 minute drive from Yarrangobilly Caves and Selwyn Snow Resort. Thank you, we will be back !

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
We had a peaceful and memorable 4-night stay at Alpine Tourist Park – the perfect family getaway!

The location is ideal – just a 35-minute scenic drive to Selwyn Snow Resort, and close to the incredible Yarrangobilly Caves and Thermal Pool, which our whole family loved exploring.

The park itself is quiet, clean, and surrounded by beautiful nature. A huge thank you to Andrea and her family, who were amazing hosts – so welcoming and helpful throughout our stay.

We couldn’t have asked for a better base for our Snowy Mountains adventure. Highly recommend for families looking to relax and reconnect in a peaceful setting. We’ll definitely be back!

Thank you 🙏 From Adam & the family

The perfect place for families to stay when skiing at Selwyn. Comfortable, clean and well equipped, affordable cabins in walking distance to the town centre, Adaminaby. Excellent bakery in town. The caravan park is well run by a lovely family who made us feel very welcome. Drying room. Games for kids. Will definitely stay here next year.

Great little family owned and run tourist park. The owners are very friendly, welcoming and helpful. Amenities were clean (and warm!). It's very conveniently located to Selwyn snow fields (an easy half hour scenic drive up the range). We'll be back!

Cabins were very clean comfortable and warm.  The host was excellent and went out of her way to help very friendly and kind .  Being dog friendly a bonus as travelling with dog  highly recommend    Great part of the world

Nice clean park
Very friendly
Lovely well cared for park. Toilet facilities clean with plenty of disinfectant sprays in toilets for use . Proprietors friendly and most hospitable.  Will stay here now on our visits to this area.

I have stayed here on previous occasions to Friendly staff, very clean, and the location works for he.
👍

I recently camped with my family and had a wonderful time.  The staff were fantastic to deal with; nothing was a problem for them, and they were genuinely kind and helpful.  The facilities were very clean, and the hot water in showers was excellent.  We will definitely stay again.
Spent an autumn long weekend at this great Park. Fantastic location, cabin was warm, clean tidy and had everything you need for a tranquil family getaway in the snowy mountains.Highly recommended!

Great place to base a larger group of people to explore the greater snowy mountains area. The park is very quiet and peaceful and an easy stroll to the local shops and pub.
A mix of cabins are available to suit larger groups.
Great cabins, friendly staff in a fantastic location, a lovely part of the world to visit.

Such a peaceful and cozy spot!
We had a fantastic stay at the Alpine Tourist Park in Adaminaby.
The cabins were super clean, warm, and well equipped - perfect after a day exploring the snowy mountains.
The park itself is quiet and beautifully maintained, with lovely grassy sites and great views of the surrounding countryside.
The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful, offering local tips and making us feel right at home. It’s also just a short drive to Lake Eucumbene, which is perfect for fishing, having a sunset picnic or simply going for a walk to take in the scenery.
Highly recommend for anyone wanting a relaxed getaway in the high country.
We will definitely be back!

We had a fantastic stay at the Alpine Tourist Park in Adaminaby.  The cabins were super clean, warm, and well equipped - perfect after a day exploring the Snowy Mountains. The park itself is quiet and beautifully maintained, with lovely grassy sites and great views of the surrounding countryside.|The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful, offering local tips and making us feel right at home. It's just a short drive to Lake Eucembene, which is perfect for fishing, having a sunset picnic or simply going for a walk to take in the scenery.|Highly recommend for anyone wanting a relaxed getaway in the high country.|We'll definitely be back!

I work on the Snowy 2.0 project and have been living in the park for the last 5 months. The cabin is spacious and has everything I need for my 2 week swing. The staff are welcoming and keep my accommodation clean at all times. I enjoy relaxing in a quiet park and won’t be going anywhere soon.
Great location, facilities and friendly staff.  Very impressed!

I stayed at the Alpine for work using my van.
The sites are flat well kept, the amenities are clean.
Andrea and staff are super friendly and eager to help.
I would stay here again.
Keep up the great work.
We absolutely loved everything about this place:) Andrea and John were lovely doing everything they could for us to feel at home. Thank you:)
Just the best value for money when visiting the area .
We had a beautiful getaway with the family, enjoying lots of fun activities. We can’t wait to go back, what a great spot!
Both the owners and the manager are very welcoming and do everything they can to ensure a  comfortable stay.

Such a lovely place to stay. Close walk to shops, restaurants, cafes. Perfect location to take the family skiing in the winter or LakeEucumbene is about 4 km away for the summer sports and trout fishing.

Fantastic
Staff facilities awesome
Had a fabulous experience at The Alpine. We can’t wait to book again.
Very comfy warm and convenient
Amazing friendly staff. Helpful and welcoming park. Highly recommend!!

We were fortunate to be up-graded to a cabin that had been recently updated and it was beautiful - excellent bathroom and well set-up kitchen, comfy bed and living area. We’re sorry we were just passing through.
The park is very well cared for with grass areas and new gardens happening
Location is not on Lake Eucumbene but convenient for the town.
Tranquil Haven Right in Adaminaby.

Upgraded room was very nice + front desk and dining room staff were friendly, attentive, and helpful.
Thank you

We were staying there during the winter time with two families.  Andrea a d her staff were very helpful.  The room are great for families and functional. The cabin very neatly and clean.  The location in small town kept away from busy tourist areas.  We enjoyed our stay and definitely return  back. Highly recommended
Great location , very clean property , rooms were great, clean and spatious , and host was supper friendly .  A hone away from home feeling
A really relaxing experience. Welcoming staff, fab location and nice and clean.
Neskutočne krásne miesto, príroda a aktivity
Wonderful staff and management, high quality service and kindness.

Alpine tourist park is  a beautiful, peaceful spot surrounded by nature—perfect any time of the year. The grounds are well-kept, and the owners are genuinely lovely. It's great for relaxing or exploring the area. Definitely worth a visit.

Visiting this beautiful place in the heart of stunning nature was an incredible experience for me and my whole family. If you’re looking for peace and relaxation in this hectic world, I definitely recommend it!
I love this place.

My experience at the Alpine Tourist Park was absolutely amazing. The team was extremely helpful from my initial phone call and for my whole stay at the park. My cabins exceeded my expectations and I look forward to going back for another relaxing experience. Highly recommend it to anyone
John and Andrea are the best hosts. A beautiful Snowy Mountains location with so much to do ans explore.

Great accomodation and conveniently located near the shops and hotel. Lovely owners who are obliging and happy to provide loads of info about local area and things to do.
Would highly recommend to anyone looking for well priced accomodation in a great area

We stayed a few nights.
The accommodation was fantastic, and the owners Andrea and John, were very hospitable, nice and polite
With easy access to Snowy mountains and nearby towns,fishing.. Relaxing, bush walking etc
All in all, a delightful place to visit, stay and spend a few relaxing days..
The cabins are spacious, comfortable and adequate for the most part.
I will definitely be returning, the next time I grow weary of boring, rushed city... life

Was a great weekend get away great location, cabin, ammenities and the most helpful staff Cheryl was absolutely fantastic helping us with guidance of places to see and where to eat.
The caravan park looks very well taken care of and look forward to a return trip in the near future.

The Alpine Tourist Park provided an amazing experience for my family and me! The facilities were spotless, and the natural surroundings were breathtaking, offering plenty of space for the kids to play and explore. The staff were incredibly friendly and went above and beyond to ensure our stay was comfortable. The peaceful atmosphere made it a perfect getaway from the city. We can’t wait to come back again!

My son and I had 2 wonderful weeks at Alpine Tourist Park again this year. The property is beautiful and close to town and Lake Eucumbene. The family who own the park are wonderful hosts and the amenities are always spotless. We will be back in July to hit the ski fields. An excellent park and great value for money, we couldn't  be happier.

If you are worried by old reviews - don’t. The place has new very generous and very friendly owners. They try their best to make this place work after years of neglect by the previous owner.|I stayed there for two nights and had really good time.

I recently stayed at this caravan park with my 2 grandsons, and we had a fantastic time . The cozy cabin was incredibly comfortable and well- equipped making it the perfect base for our adventures. We spent our days fishing and exploring the beautiful surroundings.|The park’s location made it easy for us to access nearby trails and fishing spots, creating unforgettable memories.|I highly recommend this caravan park to anyone looking for a cozy retreat where they can enjoy quality time with loved ones while reconnecting with nature.|We’ll definitely be back for another visit!

Tourist Alpine Park offers a charming and tranquil retreat for travelers looking to experience the beauty of nature. Located in a scenic area, the park provides a variety of accommodation options, from spacious camping sites to well-equipped cabins. Visitors will appreciate the clean amenities, friendly staff, and peaceful atmosphere. It’s a great base for exploring nearby hiking trails and outdoor activities, making it ideal for nature lovers and families🤩. Overall, Tourist Alpine Park delivers a relaxing and enjoyable stay in a stunning alpine setting.😃

Clean spotless accomodation, cozy rooms. Helpful staf, recomended available activity suited for our needs. We were bush walking and push biking. Kids loved fishing, playing in the caravan park facilities.|Great location, and great for a family vacation.

….We spent some time in Alpine tourist park with our 3 years old  son and we loved it. Great location to spent some time in nature and very nice daily trips around.|Amenities very clean with no issues:)Highly recommended and we will definitely come back.
Great spot for camping, plenty of space for unpowered sites, reasonably priced, clean facilities. Hot showers and dog friendly, highly recommend!
Good, slept in the back of the car. Amenities good.
New owners who are spending a lot to bring back the park to a place you want to come back to stay

As a guest at Alpine Tourist Park in Adaminaby Snowy Mountains, I can’t recommend this place highly enough. From the moment we arrived, it felt like home, thanks to the warm welcome from the family-owned Park. The range of activities each time we have stayed through different seasons, from fishing to skiing, are bountiful. Plus, being in the heart of Adaminaby meant we had access to all the conveniences we needed. The upgraded accommodations and free Wi-Fi made our stay even more comfortable - no complaints from kids! Exploring the Selwyn Snowfields and Kosciusko National Park was a highlight, and coming back to the tranquility of the park’s rich gardens was the perfect way to unwind. We can’t wait to come back again and again and make more memories in this beautiful setting.

We are so please to have access to this holiday park. Great for the family. And my friends who have also been really can’t stop talking about their wonderful experiences. It’s so clean and the customer service is wonderful. A great place to visit.  Absolutely stunning location. Clean air. Staff are so friendly and available.

Great place to stay. Had 4 visits during December 23 and January 24. What more can you ask for, clean, hot showers, welcoming, and the new owners always available and willing to assist. As Arnie would say 'I'll be back.

Affordable, clean, and comfortable accommodation. Stayed in the largest cabin that had everything we need. The hosts, Andrea and John were very helpful and friendly. A perfect place to relax and recharge. Looking forward to coming back!
Very overpriced no disabled facilities

It’s a beautiful location and so much wildlife near by.
You can walk on the property down to little bakery and shops, which is 5 min walking . There is also beautiful river 10 minutes driving, where you can catch beautiful trout. Definitely a place to stay if you want to get out in nature and just relax with kids. The owners are very welcoming and beautiful people.

Very wonderful and relaxing experience. :) thanks for having us  and we will definitely be back.

We spent the New Year's weekend there camping. The place is clean and quiet but has full reception. There are toilets and hot showers. The new owners are very friendly and helpful, showing you around and share their great fishing spots as well as their freshly caught trouts. The park has enough grassy area for camping and many cabins which are being upgraded.
💯. Great place Wow!

Krásne miesto na oddych. Pobudla som tu pár dni kde som sa cítila  úžasne. To ticho v peknej prírode je ako balzam na dušu. Majiteľka pani Andrejka je veľmi milá, prívetiva a hlavne ústretová. Som rada že som ju mala možnosť stretnúť. Vrele odporúčam každému kto si chce oddýchnuť v krásnom parku.

Great Accomodation! I stayed here with my 2 young boys age 7 & 5, we had the best time. It was clean, comfortable and the owners were very accommodate and very hospitable.
Exceptional service.  Lots of things to do from fishing to bush walks.
Highly recommend it if you just want a relaxing get away.

This park has everything what is needed for comfy familly vacation.
Well kept in nice location, plenty to do for the kids. Will come back again.🤩

This a fantastic facility. Clean, tidy, spacious, great location ticks all the boxes. Thoroughly enjoyed the evenings outdoors around the premises. Very friendly and helpful hosts, couldn’t have asked for a better experience! Highly recommend.

Great location, beautiful place to stay all season round! Cabin's are clean, well equipped and very comfortable.
The service is exceptional.

Strávili sme v campe úžasne chvíle odpočinku a neskutočne veľa zážitkov v okoli campu pretože je obklopený nádhernými prírodnými krásami .
Bolo nám poskytnuté maximálne pohodlie s vinikajucim prístupom personálu . Vinikajuce jedlo a obsluha v neďalekej reštaurácii zavŕšili našu spokojnosť .
Vrelo odporúčam ďalším záujemcom ubytovanie v tomto campe !!!

Every stay here has been 10/10! We visit Adaminaby often and this is the perfect spot to stay. Right next to the small town with a great pub and bakery, location couldn’t be better. The owners and staff are so friendly and welcoming, giving off the best small town vibes! Great for families and a must for fishos, with excellent trout fishing a 10 minute drive up the road. Would highly recommend!
We had such an amazing time during the weekend. The place is beautiful and close to many activities for the little ones. Highly recommend 👌

Wow this place is lovely. New upgraded cabins were perfect for our young family using it as a base to explore the snowy mountains. Short drive down to the lake and river, Short walk to the pub for dinner and the bakery for brekky, cabins were drastically better than what we expected and the whole park seems to have been cleaned up nicely compared to a stay a few years back.

Nice and quiet, dog friendly
Close to shops and close to Lake Eucumbene where there is good fishing
Great park and cabins for a weekends fishing. Clean and comfortable, the hosts are friendly and helpful.  Easily recommended.

great place to stay the new owners and manager are fantastic people very friendly the cabins are warm and comfy if you are looking for a great place to stay to fish this is the place just fantastic thanks for a wonderful stay
Great now there are new owners
